blockers: brew + the homebrew-cask tap are unavailable on this Linux container, and cask audit is macOS-only, so Phase 2 DRYRUN validation (brew style + brew audit) must run on a Mac.
gh and autopkg are not installed (gh is only needed at submit time; autopkg is optional for sourcing).
notes: ADDED 234 to registry; NOT-ADDED 84 need custom resolvers (categorized in readiness.md), 214 review/ineligible.
cask-master.sh sudo: SUDO_NOPASSWD=1 (default) prompts once then writes a temp /etc/sudoers.d drop-in auto-removed on exit (no per-install prompts). SUDO_NOPASSWD=0 = keep-timestamp-warm only.
readiness.md is the per-app revisit doc: Added / needs-resolver (by why) / review-ineligible (with reason).
Do NOT submit; DRYRUN + run cask-master.sh on macOS.
